info.title: TsCommentify.Cli
info.description: A CLI tool that automatically generates JSDoc comments for TypeScript functions, methods, getters, and setters. Supports configurable ignore patterns for test files.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: TsCommentify - Add missing comments to TypeScript functions

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to a TypeScript file or directory containing TypeScript files
